title: Mustardy Silky Scottish Smoked Salmon Afternoon Tea Sandwich
description: Indulge in the rich flavors of Scotland with this silky smoked salmon afternoon tea sandwich, featuring a hint of mustard and a touch of extra virgin olive oil, all carefully prepared in a kadhai and steamed to perfection using the mushimono method.
instructions: Preheat the kadhai over medium heat, adding the extra virgin olive oil to coat the bottom.
In a small bowl, mix the Dijon mustard and lemon juice until well combined.
Add the smoked salmon to the bowl, breaking it up gently with a fork to combine with the mustard mixture.
Stir in the chopped fresh dill and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Arrange the gluten-free bread slices on a plate or tray, ready for assembly.
Using the mushimono-steam method, steam the bread slices for 2-3 minutes to give them a silky texture.
Assemble the sandwiches by spooning the smoked salmon mixture onto the steamed bread slices.
Garnish with additional chopped fresh dill if desired.
Prepare a selection of teas to accompany the sandwiches, such as Earl Grey or English Breakfast.
